stimulus: The Domesday Book, compiled in 1086, is the earliest comprehensive land survey of England. The manuscript ______blank records of more than 13,000 settlements, including small villages whose names might otherwise have been forgotten.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. A main clause requires a finite (tensed) verb. The finite present tense verb “contains” correctly serves as the main verb performing the action of the subject “the manuscript.”

Choices B, C, and D are all nonfinite forms (infinitive, present participle, progressive infinitive) that cannot serve as the main verb of a clause.
